metadata.name: Iowa Entity Details
metadata.description: Search by Business Number on Iowa SOS, navigate directly to summary page, and extract comprehensive entity details including names, registered agent, principal office, and chapter code

variables.name: identifier
variables.description: Iowa SOS Business Number (injected by handler from decoded uniqueKey)

variables.name: searchEntryUrl
variables.description: Iowa SOS business search page URL

variables.name: correlationId
variables.description: Trace correlation ID from calling client

actions.description: Load Iowa SOS business search page
Wait for search form to render
Select 'Search by Business Number' radio button
Wait for Business Number input to appear
Enter business number into search field
Wait for submit button to be present in DOM
Wait for entity summary content to render
actions.javascript: () => { const h1 = document.querySelector('h1'); return h1 && h1.textContent.includes('Business Entity Summary'); }

actions.description: Extract all entity details from table-based layout: Business No., Legal Name, Status, Type, State of Inc., Modified, Expiration Date, Effective Date, Filing Date, Chapter, Names list, Registered Agent, Principal Office
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const tables = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article table')); if (tables.length === 0) return JSON.stringify({ error: 'No detail tables found' }); const mainTable = tables[0]; const allCells = Array.from(mainTable.querySelectorAll('td')); const allHeaders = Array.from(mainTable.querySelectorAll('th')); const getValueByHeader = (headerText) => { for (let i = 0; i < allHeaders.length; i++) { if (normalize(allHeaders[i].textContent) === headerText) { const row = allHeaders[i].closest('tr'); const nextRow = row?.nextElementSibling; if (nextRow) { const cells = nextRow.querySelectorAll('td'); const idx = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('th')).indexOf(allHeaders[i]); if (cells[idx]) return normalize(cells[idx].textContent); } } } return null; }; const identifier = getValueByHeader('Business No.'); const legalName = getValueByHeader('Legal Name'); const status = getValueByHeader('Status'); const entityType = getValueByHeader('Type'); const stateOfIncorporation = getValueByHeader('State of Inc.'); const modified = getValueByHeader('Modified'); const expirationDate = getValueByHeader('Expiration Date'); const effectiveDate = getValueByHeader('Effective Date'); const filingDate = getValueByHeader('Filing Date'); const chapterCode = getValueByHeader('Chapter'); const names = []; const namesHeading = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h2')).find(h => h.textContent.includes('Names')); if (namesHeading) { const namesTable = namesHeading.nextElementSibling; if (namesTable?.tagName === 'TABLE') { const nameRows = Array.from(namesTable.querySelectorAll('tr')).filter(r => r.querySelectorAll('td').length >= 4); nameRows.forEach(row => { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); names.push({ type: normalize(cells[0]?.textContent), status: normalize(cells[1]?.textContent), modified: normalize(cells[2]?.textContent).toLowerCase() === 'yes', name: normalize(cells[3]?.textContent) }); }); } } const extractContactTable = (headingText) => { const heading = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h2')).find(h => h.textContent.includes(headingText)); if (!heading) return null; const table = heading.nextElementSibling; if (!table?.tagName === 'TABLE') return null; const getValue = (hdrText) => { const headers = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('th')); for (const hdr of headers) { if (normalize(hdr.textContent) === hdrText) { const row = hdr.closest('tr'); const nextRow = row?.nextElementSibling; if (nextRow) { const cells = nextRow.querySelectorAll('td'); const idx = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('th')).indexOf(hdr); return cells[idx] ? normalize(cells[idx].textContent) : null; } } } return null; }; return { fullName: getValue('Full Name') || '', address: getValue('Address') || '', address2: getValue('Address 2') || null, cityStateZip: getValue('City, State, Zip') || '' }; }; const registeredAgent = extractContactTable('Registered Agent'); const principalOffice = extractContactTable('Principal Office'); const certificateNote = 'Certificate of Existence available via Iowa SOS website (paywall - not available via this API)'; return JSON.stringify({ identifier, legalName, status, entityType, stateOfIncorporation, modified: modified?.toLowerCase() === 'yes', expirationDate, effectiveDate, filingDate, chapterCode, names, registeredAgent, principalOffice, certificateNote, state: 'IA' }); }
